title: Google Just Dropped The Singularity Bomb
summary: Google DeepMind's Demis Hassabis claims humanity is approaching the singularity foothills as AI agents now handle coding, research, and scientific work. The focus has shifted from AI perfection to whether imperfect but useful AI can accelerate all domains, with current agents demonstrating practical utility in reducing task duration from days to minutes.
